CustomField.description: When checked, rollup batch jobs process ALL Account and Contact records regardless of whether they have related Opportunities or Opportunity Contact Roles. By default (unchecked), the rollup engine skips records with no related Opportunities for better performance. Enable this if you need to zero out rollup fields on records that previously had Opportunities but no longer do.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Process all Accounts and Contacts during rollups, even those without related Opportunities. Enable to reset rollup fields to zero on records with no remaining Opportunities.
CustomField.label: Disable Related Records Filter
